name: Banana Cake/Peanut Butter Icing
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Mashed bananas; very ripe (about 2 large bananas)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
2. In another bowl, combine bananas and buttermilk. Set aside.
3. Cream together the shortening and sugar in a large bowl until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs one at a time, ensuring each is well incorporated.
4. Add vanilla extract and mix thoroughly.
5. Alternately add flour mixture and banana mixture to the shortening mixture, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Beat until just combined.
6. Spread batter evenly into a greased and floured 13 by 9 by 2-inch pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-35 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow cake to cool completely on a wire rack.
8. To make icing: Mix together cream cheese and corn syrup until smooth. Gradually add peanut butter and beat until well blended.
9. Spread icing over the cooled cake. Garnish with chopped peanuts before refrigerating until serving time.
